Health app implementation for Pebble firmware, including data management, UI components, and activity, heart rate, and sleep metrics.


## Files
- **[health.c](health.c.md)**: Implements the main functionality for the Pebble Health app, including initialization, event handling, and termination.
- **[health.h](health.h.md)**: Declares a function to obtain system information about the health application.
- **[health_activity_detail_card.c](health_activity_detail_card.c.md)**: Implements a health activity detail card for displaying health metrics like calories and distance.
- **[health_activity_detail_card.h](health_activity_detail_card.h.md)**: Functions to create and destroy a health activity detail window using health data.
- **[health_activity_summary_card.c](health_activity_summary_card.c.md)**: Implements a health activity summary card with progress bar and step count display for Pebble firmware.
- **[health_activity_summary_card.h](health_activity_summary_card.h.md)**: Functions for creating, handling, and destroying health activity summary layers in a UI.
- **[health_activity_summary_card_segments.h](health_activity_summary_card_segments.h.md)**: Defines segments for a health activity summary card, with variations for black-and-white and color displays.
- **[health_card_view.c](health_card_view.c.md)**: Implements a health card view system for displaying activity, heart rate, and sleep summaries on a Pebble device.
- **[health_card_view.h](health_card_view.h.md)**: Defines the HealthCardView structure and functions to create, destroy, push, and refresh it.
- **[health_data.c](health_data.c.md)**: Manages health data including steps, sleep, heart rate, and activity sessions for Pebble firmware.
- **[health_data.h](health_data.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing and retrieving health metrics in a wearable device.
- **[health_data_private.h](health_data_private.h.md)**: Defines the `HealthData` structure for tracking step, sleep, and heart rate metrics.
- **[health_detail_card.c](health_detail_card.c.md)**: Implements a health detail card for Pebble firmware, including drawing headings, subtitles, and progress bars.
- **[health_detail_card.h](health_detail_card.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for creating and managing health detail cards in the Pebble firmware.
- **[health_graph_card.c](health_graph_card.c.md)**: Implements a health graph card for Pebble firmware, including drawing functions and configuration.
- **[health_graph_card.h](health_graph_card.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for creating and managing a health graph card in the Pebble firmware.
- **[health_hr_detail_card.c](health_hr_detail_card.c.md)**: Implements a heart rate detail card for displaying health data in different zones and headings.
- **[health_hr_detail_card.h](health_hr_detail_card.h.md)**: Functions to create and destroy a health heart rate detail window using health data.
- **[health_hr_summary_card.c](health_hr_summary_card.c.md)**: Implements a heart rate summary card for Pebble firmware, displaying current and resting BPM with a pulsing heart animation.
- **[health_hr_summary_card.h](health_hr_summary_card.h.md)**: Functions for creating, handling, and destroying a heart rate summary card in a health application.
- **[health_hr_summary_card_segments.h](health_hr_summary_card_segments.h.md)**: Defines segments for a heart rate summary progress bar with corner and vertical types.
- **[health_progress.c](health_progress.c.md)**: Functions for drawing and managing health progress bars in a graphical context.
- **[health_progress.h](health_progress.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for rendering and managing health progress bars.
- **[health_sleep_detail_card.c](health_sleep_detail_card.c.md)**: Implements a sleep detail card for displaying sleep data, including sessions, deep sleep, and averages.
- **[health_sleep_detail_card.h](health_sleep_detail_card.h.md)**: Functions to create and destroy a health sleep detail window using health data.
- **[health_sleep_summary_card.c](health_sleep_summary_card.c.md)**: Renders a sleep summary card with progress bars and text for current and typical sleep data.
- **[health_sleep_summary_card.h](health_sleep_summary_card.h.md)**: Defines functions and types for creating and managing a health sleep summary card UI layer.
- **[health_sleep_summary_card_segments.h](health_sleep_summary_card_segments.h.md)**: Defines segments and adjustments for a sleep summary progress bar in the Pebble firmware.
- **[health_ui.c](health_ui.c.md)**: Functions for rendering health-related text boxes in a graphical user interface.
- **[health_ui.h](health_ui.h.md)**: Functions for drawing and rendering text boxes in the health UI.
